title: lobelia wahiawa
intro: Lobelia wahiawa is a rare and endangered species of flowering plant native to the island of Oahu, Hawaii. It is a member of the Lobelia genus and is also known as the Oahu lobelia or Hawaiian lobelia. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Lobelia wahiawa include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, and it is often prepared as a tincture or tea for these purposes.
